homepage.heroSubline: Reliable repairs and expert maintenance for your home. Serving Seattle and surrounding areas with pride.
aboutText: Mickey 'the Maintenance Man' LLC started with a simple goal: provide honest, reliable handyman services to our Seattle neighbors. We saw a need for skilled professionals who treat every home with the same care and attention they would their own.

Our approach is straightforward: clear communication, quality workmanship, and a commitment to exceeding expectations. We value integrity and transparency in every project, big or small, ensuring you're always informed and satisfied.

We're proud to be a part of the Seattle community. From supporting local initiatives to sourcing materials responsibly, we're dedicated to making a positive impact on the city we call home. We understand the unique challenges Seattle homes face, and we're here to help.

services.name: Roof Moss Removal
services.shortDescription: Protect your Seattle roof from moss and water damage.
services.description:
Seattle's constant moisture creates the perfect breeding ground for moss, lichen, and algae on roofs. This growth doesn't just look unsightly; it traps moisture, leads to wood rot, and shortens the lifespan of your roof. Mickey 'the Maintenance Man' LLC offers professional roof moss removal services to protect your investment.

Our experienced team uses safe and effective techniques to remove moss without damaging your roofing materials. We start with a thorough assessment of your roof's condition, identifying areas of concern and tailoring our approach accordingly. We use specialized tools and eco-friendly treatments to gently lift and remove moss, algae, and debris.

Once the moss is removed, we apply a preventative treatment to inhibit future growth. We also clean your gutters and downspouts to ensure proper drainage, preventing water buildup that can exacerbate moss growth. Regular roof moss removal is essential for maintaining the integrity of your Seattle home.
process: Step 1: Roof inspection to assess moss growth and roof condition.
Step 2: Gentle removal of moss and debris using specialized tools.
Step 3: Application of environmentally friendly moss inhibitor.
Step 4: Gutter cleaning to ensure proper drainage and prevent future growth.
benefits: Extends the life of your roof
Prevents water damage and wood rot
Improves curb appeal
Protects your home investment

faq.question: How often should I have my roof cleaned in Seattle?
faq.answer: In Seattle's wet climate, we recommend having your roof inspected and cleaned every 1-2 years to prevent moss buildup and potential damage.

faq.question: Will roof moss removal damage my shingles?
faq.answer: Our team uses gentle, proven techniques and eco-friendly treatments to remove moss without damaging your shingles. We prioritize the integrity of your roof.

faq.question: Do you offer any guarantees on your roof moss removal service?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a satisfaction guarantee on our roof moss removal service. We stand behind the quality of our work and ensure you're happy with the results.

services.name: Gutter Cleaning & Repair
services.shortDescription: Keep your gutters flowing freely with our expert cleaning and repair services.
services.description:
Clogged gutters are a common problem in Seattle, WA. With our frequent rainfall, leaves, needles, and debris quickly accumulate, causing water to overflow and potentially damage your home's foundation, siding, and landscaping. Mickey 'the Maintenance Man' LLC provides comprehensive gutter cleaning and repair services to keep your system functioning properly.

Our experienced technicians will remove all debris from your gutters and downspouts, ensuring proper water flow. We'll also inspect your gutters for any signs of damage, such as leaks, sagging, or rust. If necessary, we can perform repairs to restore your gutters to optimal condition. We handle everything from minor patching to complete gutter replacement.

Regular gutter maintenance is essential for protecting your Seattle home from water damage. Don't wait until you have a problem – schedule your gutter cleaning and repair service with Mickey 'the Maintenance Man' LLC today.
process: Step 1: Removal of leaves, debris, and other obstructions from gutters.
Step 2: Flushing of downspouts to ensure clear water flow.
Step 3: Inspection of gutters for damage, leaks, or sagging.
Step 4: Repair or replacement of damaged gutter sections as needed.
benefits: Prevents water damage to your home's foundation
Protects siding and landscaping from water overflow
Extends the life of your gutters
Reduces the risk of ice dams in winter

faq.question: How often should I clean my gutters in Seattle?
faq.answer: We recommend cleaning your gutters at least twice a year in Seattle, once in the spring and again in the fall, to remove accumulated leaves and debris.

faq.question: What are the signs of damaged gutters?
faq.answer: Signs of damaged gutters include leaks, sagging, rust, overflowing water, and water stains on your home's siding.

faq.question: Do you offer gutter guard installation?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer gutter guard installation to help prevent debris from entering your gutters and reducing the need for frequent cleaning.

services.name: Dry Rot Repair
services.shortDescription: Combat Seattle's dampness with our expert dry rot repair services.
services.description:
Dry rot is a common problem in Seattle's wet climate. This wood-decaying fungus thrives in damp environments and can cause significant damage to your home's structure. Mickey 'the Maintenance Man' LLC specializes in dry rot repair, helping you protect your investment and maintain the integrity of your property.

Our experienced carpenters will assess the extent of the damage and develop a comprehensive repair plan. We'll remove the affected wood, treat the surrounding area to prevent further spread, and replace the damaged sections with high-quality, weather-resistant materials. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring a seamless repair that blends seamlessly with your home's existing architecture.

Don't let dry rot compromise the safety and value of your Seattle home. Contact Mickey 'the Maintenance Man' LLC for expert dry rot repair services.
process: Step 1: Thorough inspection to identify and assess dry rot damage.
Step 2: Removal of affected wood and treatment of surrounding areas.
Step 3: Precise cutting and installation of new, treated lumber.
Step 4: Sealing and painting to match existing finishes and prevent future moisture intrusion.
benefits: Prevents further structural damage
Restores the integrity of your home
Improves safety and stability
Increases property value

faq.question: What are the signs of dry rot?
faq.answer: Signs of dry rot include soft, crumbly wood, a musty odor, and visible fungal growth. The wood may also appear darker or discolored.

faq.question: How can I prevent dry rot?
faq.answer: Prevent dry rot by ensuring proper ventilation, addressing leaks promptly, and using treated lumber for exterior projects.

faq.question: Is dry rot repair covered by homeowner's insurance?
faq.answer: In some cases, dry rot repair may be covered by homeowner's insurance, depending on the cause of the damage and the terms of your policy. We recommend checking with your insurance provider.

services.name: Deck Repair & Staining
services.shortDescription: Restore and protect your Seattle deck with our repair and staining services.
services.description:
Seattle decks take a beating from the elements. Rain, sun, and temperature fluctuations can cause wood to warp, crack, and fade. Mickey 'the Maintenance Man' LLC offers comprehensive deck repair and staining services to keep your outdoor space looking its best.

Our skilled carpenters can repair damaged deck boards, railings, and stairs. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a durable and lasting repair. We also offer power washing and staining services to revitalize your deck's appearance and protect it from the elements.

Whether you need a minor repair or a complete deck restoration, Mickey 'the Maintenance Man' LLC is here to help. We'll work with you to create a beautiful and functional outdoor space that you can enjoy for years to come.
process: Step 1: Thorough inspection of the deck to identify damaged or worn areas.
Step 2: Repair or replacement of damaged boards, railings, and stairs.
Step 3: Power washing to remove dirt, mildew, and old stain.
Step 4: Application of high-quality stain or sealant to protect the wood.
benefits: Extends the life of your deck
Enhances the beauty of your outdoor space
Increases safety and stability
Protects against weather damage

faq.question: How often should I stain my deck in Seattle?
faq.answer: We recommend staining your deck every 2-3 years in Seattle to protect it from the elements and maintain its appearance.

faq.question: What type of stain is best for a Seattle deck?
faq.answer: We recommend using a high-quality, oil-based stain or sealant that is specifically designed for exterior use and can withstand Seattle's wet climate.

faq.question: Can you repair a deck that is severely damaged?
faq.answer: We can assess the extent of the damage and determine the best course of action. In some cases, a complete deck replacement may be necessary.

services.name: Interior Painting
services.shortDescription: Transform your Seattle home with our professional interior painting services.
services.description:
A fresh coat of paint can do wonders for your Seattle home. Whether you're looking to update a single room or repaint your entire interior, Mickey 'the Maintenance Man' LLC provides professional interior painting services to transform your living space.

Our experienced painters will prepare your walls properly, ensuring a smooth and flawless finish. We use high-quality paints and proven techniques to deliver exceptional results. We also offer color consultation services to help you choose the perfect colors for your home.

From prep work to cleanup, we handle every detail with care and precision. We'll protect your furniture and belongings and leave your home looking beautiful and refreshed.
process: Step 1: Thorough preparation of surfaces, including cleaning, sanding, and priming.
Step 2: Careful application of high-quality paint in the desired colors.
Step 3: Multiple coats for even coverage and lasting durability.
Step 4: Detailed cleanup and restoration of the work area.
benefits: Enhances the beauty and value of your home
Creates a fresh and inviting atmosphere
Protects walls from wear and tear
Improves indoor air quality

faq.question: How long does it take to paint a room?
faq.answer: The time it takes to paint a room depends on the size of the room, the condition of the walls, and the number of coats required. We'll provide you with an estimated timeline before we begin the project.

faq.question: Do I need to move my furniture before you start painting?
faq.answer: We recommend moving any valuable or fragile items before we start painting. We'll cover and protect the remaining furniture to prevent any damage.

faq.question: What type of paint do you use?
faq.answer: We use high-quality, low-VOC paints that are durable, long-lasting, and environmentally friendly.

services.name: Fence Repair
services.shortDescription: Secure your property with our reliable fence repair services in Seattle.
services.description:
Seattle's weather can be hard on fences. Wind, rain, and moisture can cause wood to rot, warp, and break. Mickey 'the Maintenance Man' LLC offers expert fence repair services to keep your fence strong and secure.

Our skilled technicians can repair damaged posts, panels, and gates. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a durable and lasting repair. We also offer fence staining and painting services to protect your fence from the elements and enhance its appearance.

Whether you need a minor repair or a complete fence restoration, Mickey 'the Maintenance Man' LLC is here to help. We'll work with you to create a fence that is both functional and aesthetically pleasing.
process: Step 1: Inspection of the fence to identify damaged or weakened areas.
Step 2: Repair or replacement of damaged posts, panels, and gates.
Step 3: Reinforcement of weak points and structural support.
Step 4: Staining or painting to protect the wood and enhance appearance.
benefits: Secures your property and provides privacy
Enhances the curb appeal of your home
Extends the life of your fence
Increases property value

faq.question: How long does fence repair usually take?
faq.answer: The duration of fence repair depends on the extent of the damage. Minor repairs can often be completed in a day, while more extensive repairs may take longer.

faq.question: What are the common signs of fence damage?
faq.answer: Common signs of fence damage include leaning posts, broken panels, rotting wood, and loose gates.

faq.question: Can you match the existing style of my fence?
faq.answer: Yes, we can match the existing style of your fence to ensure a seamless repair. We offer a wide variety of materials and styles to choose from.

services.name: Minor Plumbing Repairs
services.shortDescription: Quick and reliable solutions for your plumbing issues.
services.description:
Leaky faucets, running toilets, and clogged drains can be frustrating and wasteful. Mickey 'the Maintenance Man' LLC offers prompt and reliable minor plumbing repair services to address these common issues in your Seattle home.

Our experienced plumbers can quickly diagnose and repair a variety of plumbing problems. We use quality parts and proven techniques to ensure a lasting repair. We can handle everything from replacing a faucet washer to unclogging a drain.

Don't let minor plumbing problems turn into major headaches. Contact Mickey 'the Maintenance Man' LLC for fast and affordable plumbing repair services.
process: Step 1: Diagnosis of the plumbing issue.
Step 2: Repair or replacement of faulty components.
Step 3: Testing to ensure proper function.
Step 4: Cleanup of the work area.
benefits: Prevents water damage
Saves water and reduces utility bills
Restores proper plumbing function
Avoids costly future repairs

faq.question: How much does a typical plumbing repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of plumbing repair varies depending on the nature and extent of the problem. We provide upfront estimates before starting any work.

faq.question: What if it's an emergency plumbing issue?
faq.answer: We prioritize emergency plumbing repairs. Call us immediately, and we'll do our best to assist you promptly.

faq.question: Are your plumbers licensed and insured?
faq.answer: Yes, our plumbers are licensed, insured, and experienced in handling a wide range of plumbing repairs.

serviceAreas.content:
Mickey "the Maintenance Man" LLC is proud to offer handyman services to the residents of Bellevue, Washington. Known for its upscale neighborhoods and a significant number of homes built between the 1980s and 2000s, Bellevue presents unique maintenance needs. From addressing wear and tear in established properties to assisting with updates and renovations, our team is equipped to handle a wide range of projects.

Bellevue's mild, wet winters can lead to issues like water damage and mold growth. We provide services such as gutter cleaning, roof repair, and weatherproofing to protect your home from the elements. Whether you're looking to maintain your property's value or enhance its comfort, Mickey "the Maintenance Man" LLC is here to help.
serviceAreas.localContext: We understand the high standards of Bellevue homeowners and tailor our services to meet your specific needs.

serviceAreas.content:

We are experienced in addressing the unique maintenance challenges that come with each type of property.

The wet Redmond climate can take a toll on homes. We offer services to combat moisture and prevent damage, including siding repair, window sealing, and drainage solutions. Whether you need help with a small repair or a larger renovation project, Mickey "the Maintenance Man" LLC is dedicated to providing quality workmanship and exceptional customer service.
serviceAreas.localContext: We are familiar with the specific needs of Redmond's residents and businesses, offering tailored solutions to ensure your property is well-maintained.

reviews.name: Sarah K.
reviews.text: Mickey's team did a fantastic job cleaning our gutters. They were overflowing with leaves and debris, and now they're flowing perfectly. They were prompt, professional, and left no mess behind!

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: We had some dry rot damage around our window frames, and Mickey's crew repaired it quickly and efficiently. The repair looks great, and we're confident it will last. Appreciated their attention to detail.

reviews.name: Emily R.
reviews.text: Our deck was looking worn and faded. Mickey's team power washed and stained it, and it looks brand new. They were very careful and did a beautiful job. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: John S.
reviews.text: Our roof was covered in moss, and we were worried about potential damage. Mickey's team removed the moss safely and effectively. They also treated the roof to prevent future growth. Excellent service!

reviews.name: Linda M.
reviews.text: Mickey's team painted our living room and dining room. They were professional, courteous, and did a great job. The colors look beautiful, and the walls are smooth and even. Would hire again.

reviews.name: Tom B.
reviews.text: Our fence was leaning and damaged after a storm. Mickey's crew repaired it quickly and efficiently. The fence is now strong and secure. Great work!
